column1: The children always___________uniforms when they are at school. (WEAR)
A lot of visitors___________alligators at the zoo. There are always a lot of people in the reptile house. (WATCH)
Where are the boys? - There they are. They____________the alligators. (WATCH)
The Ancient Greeks________good laws and strong armies. (HAVE)
I can't__________my sister. - I____________to help you. What______she___________? (FIND/TRY/WEAR)
Let's put the boots into the box. I_____________them next winter. (WEAR)
She likes jeans, but today she_____________a dress. (WEAR)
